info.title: Stability AI API
info.description: The Stability AI REST API provides endpoints for image generation, editing, upscaling, 3D model generation, and account management. The API supports both v1 (engine-based) and v2beta (stable-image) endpoint patterns.

post.summary: Generate image using Stable Image Ultra
post.description: Generate a high-quality image using Stable Image Ultra. Supports text-to-image and image-to-image generation.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Generate image using Stable Image Core
post.description: Generate an image using Stable Image Core. A fast, high-quality generation model suitable for most use cases.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate an image using Stable Diffusion 3. Supports text-to-image and image-to-image modes with multiple model variants (sd3-medium, sd3-large, sd3-large-turbo).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Quickly upscale an image using the fast upscaler. Returns the result synchronously.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Upscale an image while preserving original details using the conservative upscaler. Returns the result synchronously.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Start an asynchronous creative upscale job that reimagines the image at higher resolution. Returns a generation ID to poll for results.

200.description: Creative upscale job started. Use the returned generation ID to fetch the result.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description: Fetch the result of a creative upscale job by its generation ID. Returns 202 if still processing.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The generation ID returned from the creative upscale start request.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Fill in masked areas of an image using AI. Provide a source image, a mask, and an optional text prompt to guide the inpainting.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Extend an image beyond its original boundaries. Specify the number of pixels to extend in each direction.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Remove objects from an image by providing a mask indicating the region to erase. The erased area is filled in naturally.

200.description: Image with erased region returned successfully

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Search and replace objects in an image
post.description: Automatically locate and replace an object in an image using natural language descriptions. No mask required.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Search and recolor objects in an image
post.description: Automatically locate an object in an image using a text description and recolor it according to a prompt.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Remove the background from an image, returning the foreground subject with a transparent background.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.summary: Replace background and relight an image
post.description: Replace the background of an image and adjust lighting to match the new scene. Combines background removal with scene generation and relighting.

200.description: Image with replaced background and adjusted lighting

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate an image guided by a sketch or line drawing. The sketch provides structural guidance for the generated image.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate an image guided by a structural reference image. Preserves the spatial layout and depth of the reference.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate an image guided by a style reference image. Applies the artistic style of the reference to the generated output.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate a 3D model from a single image using Stable Fast 3D. Returns a GLB file.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate a high-quality 3D model from a single image using Stable Point-Aware 3D (SPA3D). Returns a GLB file.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description: Fetch the result of any asynchronous generation by its ID. Returns 202 if still processing.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The generation ID returned from an async generation request.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using a specified engine. This is the legacy v1 endpoint.

parameters.name: engine_id
parameters.description: The engine to use for generation (e.g., stable-diffusion-xl-1024-v1-0).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Generate a new image from an existing image and text prompt using a specified engine. This is the legacy v1 endpoint.

parameters.name: engine_id
parameters.description: The engine to use for generation (e.g., stable-diffusion-xl-1024-v1-0).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Upscale an image using a specified engine. This is the legacy v1 endpoint.

parameters.name: engine_id
parameters.description: The engine to use for upscaling (e.g., esrgan-v1-x2plus).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

post.description: Modify portions of an image using a mask and text prompt. This is the legacy v1 inpainting endpoint.

parameters.name: engine_id
parameters.description: The engine to use for masking (e.g., stable-diffusion-xl-1024-v1-0).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description: List all engines available to your organization.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description: Get the account information associated with the current API key.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

get.description: Get the credit balance for the account associated with the current API key.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid API key

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Obtain your key from https://platform.stability.ai/account/keys. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>

ImageResponse.description: Response containing a base64-encoded image when Accept header is application/json.

image.description: Base64-encoded image data

AsyncGenerationResponse.description: Response from an asynchronous generation request containing the generation ID.

id.description: The generation ID to use for polling the result

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image. Maximum 10000 characters.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing what to exclude from the image.

image.description: Optional reference image for image-to-image generation.

strength.description: How much influence the reference image has (0 = no influence, 1 = full influence). Only used with image.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image.

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility. Use 0 for a random seed.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image. Maximum 10000 characters.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing what to exclude from the image.

image.description: Optional reference image for image-to-image generation.

strength.description: How much influence the reference image has. Only used with image.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image.

style_preset.description: Preset style to guide image generation.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image. Maximum 10000 characters.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing what to exclude from the image.

image.description: Optional reference image for image-to-image generation.

strength.description: How much influence the reference image has. Only used with image.

model.description: The SD3 model variant to use.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image.

cfg_scale.description: How strictly the model follows the prompt. Higher values = stricter adherence.

image.description: The image to upscale.
The image to upscale.

prompt.description: Text prompt to guide the upscaling process.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing what to avoid during upscaling.

creativity.description: Controls the amount of creative enhancement. Lower values preserve more detail.

image.description: The image to upscale.

prompt.description: Text prompt to guide the creative upscaling.

creativity.description: Controls the level of creative reinterpretation.

image.description: The source image to inpaint.

mask.description: Mask image where white pixels indicate areas to inpaint and black pixels indicate areas to preserve.

prompt.description: Text prompt to guide the inpainting.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing what to exclude from the inpainted region.

grow_mask.description: Number of pixels to expand the mask by.

image.description: The source image to outpaint.

prompt.description: Text prompt to guide the outpainting.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing what to exclude from the outpainted region.

left.description: Number of pixels to extend to the left.

right.description: Number of pixels to extend to the right.

up.description: Number of pixels to extend upward.

down.description: Number of pixels to extend downward.

creativity.description: Controls the creative freedom of the outpainting.

image.description: The source image.

mask.description: Mask image where white pixels indicate areas to erase.

grow_mask.description: Number of pixels to expand the mask by.

image.description: The source image.

search_prompt.description: Text describing the object to find and replace.

grow_mask.description: Number of pixels to expand the detected mask by.

image.description: The source image.

select_prompt.description: Text describing the object to find and recolor.

grow_mask.description: Number of pixels to expand the detected mask by.

image.description: The image from which to remove the background.

output_format.description: Output image format. Must support transparency.

image.description: The source image containing a foreground subject.

background_prompt.description: Text describing the desired new background.

foreground_prompt.description: Text describing the foreground subject to preserve.

background_reference.description: Optional reference image for the background.

light_source_direction.description: Direction of the primary light source.

image.description: The sketch or line drawing to use as structural guidance.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image.

control_strength.description: How closely the output follows the sketch.

image.description: The reference image providing structural guidance.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image.

control_strength.description: How closely the output follows the structural reference.

image.description: The reference image providing style guidance.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired image.

fidelity.description: How closely the output matches the style of the reference.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image.

image.description: The image to generate a 3D model from.

texture_resolution.description: Resolution of the texture map for the 3D model.

foreground_ratio.description: Ratio of the foreground object in the image.

vertex_count.description: Target vertex count for remeshing. -1 for automatic.

image.description: The image to generate a 3D model from.

texture_resolution.description: Resolution of the texture map for the 3D model.

foreground_ratio.description: Ratio of the foreground object in the image.

vertex_count.description: Target vertex count for remeshing. -1 for automatic.

target_count.description: Target count for mesh or point cloud output.

text_prompts.description: Array of text prompts with optional weights.

height.description: Height of the generated image in pixels. Must be a multiple of 64.

width.description: Width of the generated image in pixels. Must be a multiple of 64.

cfg_scale.description: How strictly the generation follows the prompt.

sampler.description: Sampler to use for the diffusion process.

text_prompts.description: Array of text prompts with optional weights.

image_strength.description: How much influence the init_image has on generation.

init_image_mode.description: Whether to use image_strength or step_schedule for image influence.

step_schedule_start.description: Skips a proportion of the start of the diffusion steps.

step_schedule_end.description: Skips a proportion of the end of the diffusion steps.

cfg_scale.description: How strictly the generation follows the prompt.

image.description: The image to upscale.

width.description: Desired width of the upscaled image.

height.description: Desired height of the upscaled image.

mask_image.description: Mask image indicating regions to inpaint (white = inpaint, black = preserve).

text_prompts.description: Array of text prompts with optional weights.

cfg_scale.description: How strictly the generation follows the prompt.

weight.description: Weight of this prompt. Negative values act as negative prompts.

V1ImageResponse.description: Response from v1 generation endpoints containing one or more generated images.

seed.description: Seed used for this particular image.

email.description: Email address associated with the account.

profile_picture.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

is_default.description: Whether this is the user's default organization.

tags.name: Edit
tags.description: Image editing endpoints (inpaint, outpaint, erase, search-and-replace, etc.)

tags.name: Control
tags.description: Image generation with structural control (sketch, structure, style)
